execute_steps: run vitest: 'should load old data without verifyText/verifyAttempts'
run vitest: 'should set verifyAttempts default to 0 when migrating old data'
run vitest: 'should preserve verifyText when present in old data'
run vitest: 'should accept failed status'
run vitest: 'should include all four valid statuses'
test_execution.evidence: VALID_STATUSES includes 'failed' and all 4 statuses accepted

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should map verifyTexts to todos at corresponding indices'
Verify #1 gets verifyText, #2-#3 don't
run vitest: 'should work without verifyTexts (backward compat)'
Verify returning addTodos without verifyTexts defaults to undefined
test_execution.evidence: verifyText defaults to undefined when omitted

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should reject verifyTexts longer than texts'
Verify error message contains 'verifyTexts length exceeds texts length'
run vitest: 'should update multiple todos with updates[]'
Verify multi-todo status updates in single call
test_execution.evidence: 3 todos updated in single batch, statuses verified

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should reject duplicate ids in updates[]'
Verify error: 'duplicate ids in updates'
run vitest: 'should reject non-existent ids in updates[] (all-or-nothing)'
Verify error: 'id 999 not found'
test_execution.evidence: error returned, existing todo not modified

execute_steps: Code review: verify executeTodoAction handles both updates[] and single id/status paths
Verify old-style update(id=1, status=completed) follows non-batch code path
test_execution.evidence: executeTodoAction dispatches single-item path when no updates[] param

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should auto-clear when all completed and delay rounds elapsed'
run vitest: 'should not auto-clear when delay rounds not yet elapsed'
run vitest: 'should detect completed tasks needing verification'
run vitest: 'should format pending tasks with verifyText for context injection'
Code review: agent_end injects display:false with customType=todo-context
test_execution.evidence: agent_end context injection verified in code; filtered needs-verify logic tested

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should detect verify failure when attempts exceed max (completed status)'
run vitest: 'should increment verifyAttempts when AI re-opens completed task with verifyText'
Verify 2 failed attempts -> status=failed; TUI shows verification failure indicator
test_execution.evidence: verify-failed check before needs-verify; status transitions to 'failed' after MAX_VERIFY_ATTEMPTS=2

execute_steps: run vitest: 'should not trigger verify for tasks without verifyText'
Verify needs-verify returns undefined when verifyText absent
Code review: verify promptGuidelines for goal conflict avoidance
Goal extension and todo extension both register tools; goal tool is contextually preferred when /goal active
test_execution.evidence: todo tool has promptGuidelines section advising against use during active goal

execute_steps: Code review: verify todo tool instructions include usage triggers for multi-step work
Verify prompt describes when AI should proactively use todo (no active /goal, multi-step)
test_execution.evidence: todo tool instructions include proactive usage guidance

execute_steps: Code review: verify registerMessageRenderer exists for todo-context
Verify renderer handles [TODO] prefix and produces status summary
Run: npx tsc --noEmit for extensions/todo
Verify no todo-specific type errors
test_execution.evidence: todo extension compiles clean; pre-existing errors in model-switch/statusline unrelated
